title: ravenia urbani
intro: Ravenia urbani, also known as the "Guianese Ravenia," is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's leaves and bark are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ravenia urbani include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Ravenia urbani include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
